CustomField.formula:
TEXT(DAY(Date_of_appointment__c)) &"/"& TEXT( MONTH(Date_of_appointment__c)) &"/"& TEXT(YEAR(Date_of_appointment__c)) &""& ","&" "&
CASE(MOD( Date_of_appointment__c - DATE(1900, 1, 6), 7), 0, "יום ש'", 1, "יום א'", 2,"יום ב'", 3, "יום ג'", 4, "יום ד'", 5, "יום ה'", 6,"יום ו'","")
CustomField.label: Weekday Kit Formula
